modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help adding a drop-down list in Word.

full_description_text: I want to put a drop-down list in my Word document. I don’t know how to do it. I tried looking but it’s confusing. Can someone please help me with this?
short_description: Need help adding a drop-down list in Word.
description: I want to put a drop-down list in my Word document. I don’t know how to do it. I tried looking but it’s confusing. Can someone please help me with this?
